response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong web/backend experience, but the role requires native-level Japanese, 3+ years of C for UNIX development, Linux kernel modification experience, and embedded networking security expertise (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3, switch chips). The resume shows only brief C/C++ work at National Instruments (~6 months, 2014-2015) and no Japanese language ability, no kernel-level work, and no embedded networking security background. Core hard requirements are not met.
strengths: Long track record as a senior/staff engineer with broad polyglot experience
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a developer-tooling product
Demonstrated initiative via open-source projects, talks, and workshops
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed (role requires native-level)
No Linux kernel modification or embedded firmware security experience
No exposure to MACsec, 802.1X, switch chips, NETCONF/SNMP, or L2/L3 networking internals

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering experience and learning ability
